untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern detection requires pattern recognition (height/width measurements, consolidation identification, and breakout confirmation) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price and technical indicators. The signal requires geometric analysis of candlestick consolidation zones that are not available in the indicator set. ATR volatility comparison is a proxy but does not capture the essential flag morphology (tall vs. short, wide vs. narrow dimensions).
translation_notes: Attempted to use ATR to proxy for flag height (volatility) and price position relative to moving average to indicate consolidation context. Used 11-day hold_days_max based on stated 9-11 day formation range. Exit conditions use price reversal (price turns) as stated by author. Success rates (64% bull, 35% rise on tall breakouts) and failure rates documented but not incorporated into rule structure. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to reflect both up and down breakouts. Stop loss placement intentionally left null per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance.
